untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting 'absence of classic accumulation signals' (volume spikes, reversal wicks, support formation) and 'no follow-through buying on drops' — these are qualitative pattern-recognition concepts requiring multi-bar morphological analysis not expressible with single-bar indicators. Thresholds for sideways range detection, required absent signals count, and lookback periods are also unspecified ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED] placeholders).
translation_notes: Approximated using price_pos_20 for sideways detection (30-70th percentile range) and vol_ratio_20 for below-median volume condition. Exit conditions use Donchian breakout and volume spike as proxy for 'heavy volume breakout' and 'accumulation signal emergence'. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal logic applies to both long (distribution→reversal down) and short (distribution confirmation) scenarios depending on market context.
